title: Turkey - Tourist/Visit Visa
visa_fee: 25,000 BDT + Chologhuri Service Fee 2,000 BDT + Notary and Translation

details.title: Eligibility
items: Valid passport with at least 6 months validity.
Completed and signed visa application form.
Recent biometric photographs.
Proof of travel purpose (flight & hotel booking).
Financial proof (bank statement and solvency certificate).
Proof of occupation (employee/business/student/retired).
Travel health insurance.
National ID or Birth Certificate.

details.title: Required Documents
items: Visa application form must be filled and signed by the applicant.
A valid passport with at least 6 months validity from the date of application and at least 2 empty pages.
Passport biodata page photocopies (3 copies).
3 copies biometric photos with white background taken within the last 6 months covering full face including ears and hair, clearly visible without shadow (size 2x2 inch, matte paper).
National ID card or Birth Certificate photocopy (National ID mandatory).
Travel Health Insurance as per embassy/consulate instructions (Türkiye incoming health insurance is mandatory and can only be done by MOSAIC).
Airline ticket reservation.
Hotel reservation.
Original bank statement up to date covering the last 3 months of transactions + Original bank solvency certificate (of the cost bearer).
Covering letter / Request letter / Forwarding letter.
Introduction letter from the applicant.
Trade license attested by Notary Public (for businessmen).
Income Tax Return / TIN certificate attested by Notary Public (for businessmen and employees).
NOC + Visiting Card + Official ID (for employees).
Membership Certificate + Memorandum + Incorporation Certificate + Export/Import Certificate attested by Notary Public (for businessmen).
If applicant is below 18 and traveling with one parent, a permission letter from the other parent is required.
BMDC Certificate or Bar Council Certificate attested by Notary Public (occupation based if applicable).
Retirement letter for retired government/private officials attested by Notary Public.

note: All expenditures related to visa processing are strictly non-refundable. Visa information and associated charges are subject to change at any time without prior notice. We provide assistance only and do not guarantee the issuance of visas. This information sheet has been prepared by us and may include additional details beyond the embassy's requirements.
